nasb.text: Then King Rehoboam made shields of bronze in their place and committed them to the care of the commanders of the guard who guarded the door of the king’s house.

esv.text: and King Rehoboam made in their place shields of bronze and committed them to the hands of the officers of the guard, who kept the door of the king’s house.

cnv.text: 羅波安王做了一些銅盾牌代替那些金盾牌，交給那些看守宮門的守衛長看管。

ccb.text: 罗波安王就造了铜盾牌代替金盾牌，交给看守宫门的护卫长看管。
